interface.name: im_chat_manager_v1
interface.description: A global interface that provides a simple multi-user chat room. Clients bind to this interface to join the room, set a nickname, and exchange messages with other participants.

request.name: set_nickname
request.description: Request to set or change the client's nickname. The server will respond with either nickname_accepted or nickname_rejected. Nicknames must be unique across all connected clients.

request.name: send_message
request.description: Send a text message to the chat room. The server will broadcast it to all connected clients including the sender. The client must have a nickname set before sending messages.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy this binding. The server will notify other clients that this user has left the room.

event.name: nickname_accepted
event.description: Sent when the requested nickname has been successfully set.

event.name: nickname_rejected
event.description: Sent when the requested nickname could not be set, for example because it is already in use by another client.

event.name: message
event.description: Broadcast to all clients when any client sends a message.

event.name: user_joined
event.description: Broadcast to all clients when a new user sets their nickname and joins the chat room.

arg.name: nickname
arg.summary: nickname of the user who joined

event.name: user_left
event.description: Broadcast to all clients when a user disconnects or destroys their chat manager binding.

arg.name: nickname
arg.summary: nickname of the user who left
